description: Single source for marketing CDN facts, homepage hero screenshots, and legacy fallbacks. Hero carousel uses URL-safe WebP paths on DigitalOcean Spaces (see marketing-assets.generated.ts MARKETING_HERO_CAROUSEL_SLIDES). Regenerate via `npm run generate:marketing-assets` (requires SPACES_*).

homepageHeroCarousel.notes: Documentation only — source of truth is marketing-assets.generated.ts. Paths use ASCII filenames under screenshots/ (no spaces). Browser loads via /api/marketing-assets/... when NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKETING_USE_SPACES_PROXY is not false.

nursenestImages.notes: Anonymous GET to this hostname often returns 403 until the bucket is public. nursenest-core serves the same keys through /api/marketing-assets/... using SPACES_KEY/SPACES_SECRET (see marketing-resolve-image-url.ts). Set NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKETING_USE_SPACES_PROXY=false only for a fully public bucket.

committedMarketingAssets.notes: Homepage screenshot URLs in committed marketing-assets.generated.ts use digitalOceanSpaces.nursenestImages.publicBaseUrl + /screenshots/ (same paths as legacy site). Logo may still use legacyFallbackUrl until SPACES discovery runs.

logo.notes: Spaces object keys: branding/themes/logo-{themeId}.png (one pre-colored PNG per theme). No dynamic tinting. Proxy: /api/marketing-assets/branding/themes/... Unknown themes fall back to defaultFallbackThemeId.
logo.discoveryFilenamePattern: Objects whose key matches /logo/i (see scripts/generate-marketing-assets.mjs CATEGORY_TESTS.LOGO_PRIMARY).

lessonImages.inNursenestCore: No static DigitalOcean Spaces map. Lesson media is not hard-coded in this package.
lessonImages.notes: The main application server resolves stored object_path values to this relative API path (see server/routes.ts). Bucket id comes from deployment env (e.g. Replit object storage), not from marketing-cdn.catalog.json.
